queries.description: Always set a user in the runtime stage of your Dockerfile. Without it, the container defaults to root, even if earlier build stages define a user.

files.actual_value: The 'Dockerfile' does not contain any 'USER' instruction

queries.query_name: Apt Get Install Pin Version Not Defined
queries.description: When installing a package, its pin version should be defined

files.search_key: FROM={{lscr.io/linuxserver/webtop:ubuntu-xfce}}.RUN={{apt-get update   && apt-get --yes install --no-install-recommends vim nano gzip   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*}}
files.actual_value: Package 'nano' does not have version defined

files.search_key: FROM={{lscr.io/linuxserver/webtop:ubuntu-xfce}}.RUN={{apt-get update   && apt-get --yes install --no-install-recommends vim nano gzip   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*}}
files.actual_value: Package 'vim' does not have version defined

files.search_key: FROM={{lscr.io/linuxserver/webtop:ubuntu-xfce}}.RUN={{apt-get update   && apt-get --yes install --no-install-recommends vim nano gzip   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*}}
files.actual_value: Package 'gzip' does not have version defined

queries.query_name: Unpinned Package Version in Apk Add
queries.description: Package version pinning reduces the range of versions that can be installed, reducing the chances of failure due to unanticipated changes

files.search_key: FROM={{alpine:3.22 AS jre}}.{{RUN apk add --no-cache curl tar   && set -eux;      case "${TARGETARCH}" in        amd64) ARCH=x64 ;;        arm64) ARCH=aarch64 ;;        *) echo "Unsupported architecture: ${TARGETARCH}" >&2; exit 1 ;;      esac;      JAVA_ENC="${JAVA_FULL//+/%2B}";      JAVA_FILE="${JAVA_FULL//+/_}";      curl -sSL "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin${JAVA_MAJOR}-binaries/releases/download/jdk-${JAVA_ENC}/OpenJDK${JAVA_MAJOR}U-jre_${ARCH}_linux_hotspot_${JAVA_FILE}.tar.gz" -o /tmp/java.tgz;      mkdir -p /jre;      tar -xzf /tmp/java.tgz -C /jre --strip-components=1;      rm -f /tmp/java.tgz}}
files.expected_value: RUN instruction with 'apk add <package>' should use package pinning form 'apk add <package>=<version>'
files.actual_value: RUN instruction apk add --no-cache curl tar   && set -eux;      case "${TARGETARCH}" in        amd64) ARCH=x64 ;;        arm64) ARCH=aarch64 ;;        *) echo "Unsupported architecture: ${TARGETARCH}" >&2; exit 1 ;;      esac;      JAVA_ENC="${JAVA_FULL//+/%2B}";      JAVA_FILE="${JAVA_FULL//+/_}";      curl -sSL "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin23-binaries/releases/download/jdk-${JAVA_ENC}/OpenJDK${JAVA_MAJOR}U-jre_${ARCH}_linux_hotspot_${JAVA_FILE}.tar.gz" -o /tmp/java.tgz;      mkdir -p /jre;      tar -xzf /tmp/java.tgz -C /jre --strip-components=1;      rm -f /tmp/java.tgz does not use package pinning form

files.search_key: FROM={{alpine:3.22 AS zap}}.{{RUN apk add --no-cache curl tar   && set -eux;      curl -sSL "https://github.com/zaproxy/zaproxy/releases/download/v${ZAP_VERSION}/ZAP_${ZAP_VERSION}_Linux.tar.gz" -o /tmp/zap.tgz;      mkdir -p /zap;      tar -xzf /tmp/zap.tgz -C /zap --strip-components=1;      rm -f /tmp/zap.tgz}}
files.expected_value: RUN instruction with 'apk add <package>' should use package pinning form 'apk add <package>=<version>'
files.actual_value: RUN instruction apk add --no-cache curl tar   && set -eux;      curl -sSL "https://github.com/zaproxy/zaproxy/releases/download/v2.16.1/ZAP_${ZAP_VERSION}_Linux.tar.gz" -o /tmp/zap.tgz;      mkdir -p /zap;      tar -xzf /tmp/zap.tgz -C /zap --strip-components=1;      rm -f /tmp/zap.tgz does not use package pinning form

queries.description: It is considered a best practice for every executable in a container to be owned by the root user even if it is executed by a non-root user, only execution permissions are required on the file, not ownership
Ensure that HEALTHCHECK is being used. The HEALTHCHECK instruction tells Docker how to test a container to check that it is still working
